creative_brief: Warm overhead shot of a family unpacking a FarmThru bag on a kitchen bench: pork cuts in brown paper, wild-caught fish, farm eggs. Soft natural light. Small FarmThru logo bottom-right.
primary_text:
When was the last time you bought groceries and actually felt good about it?

Not guilty. Not confused by labels. Just genuinely proud of what you're feeding your family.

That feeling comes from knowing your food's story.

FarmThru connects you with farms like Bundarra (pork) and Collins (wild-caught seafood). Honest food from people who grow it.

No commitment. Collect from Brookvale Mon to Fri.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: Ever feel proud buying groceries?
description: Farm-direct groceries from NSW farms you can name. Order online, collect from Brookvale.
